title: Banner erasure: config prompts progressively eat banner lines
description: Each gumChoose/gumBoolean prompt overshoots cursor-up by 1 line due to wrong linesToClear (+1). Accumulated over ~10 prompts, this eats the 5-line banner. Also: FrameRenderer bottom border lacks trailing newline causing off-by-one on re-renders. Fix: (1) implement framed config summary using FrameRenderer, (2) fix linesToClear values, (3) fix bottom border newline.
close_reason: Fixed banner erasion and double Report Setup header by suppressing gum stdout echo for interactive prompts
